id: 05 Apr 2026 · 07:47 IST_1_US Rescues Second Airman from

story.headline: US Rescues Second Airman from Downed F-15 in Iran
story.summary: The United States successfully rescued the second crew member from a downed F-15E fighter jet in Iran after a daring operation involving dozens of aircraft and special forces. President Trump confirmed the injured airman was recovered following what officials described as a "heavy firefight" with Iranian forces.
story.signal: US military capabilities demonstrated despite Iran shooting down aircraft, but rescue operation highlights escalating military confrontation.

social_signals.text: WE GOT HIM!" U.S President Donald Trump says the second missing U.S. crew member from downed fighter jet has been rescued
BREAKING: A US government official has told Al Jazeera that the second crew member from the downed F-15E has been recovered after a "heavy firefight".
BREAKING: President Donald Trump says service member rescued in Iran is injured but "will be just fine" and that US was monitoring his location.

id: 05 Apr 2026 · 07:47 IST_2_Iran Claims Downing Two US Mil

story.headline: Iran Claims Downing Two US Military Aircraft in Rare Strike
story.summary: Iran claimed responsibility for shooting down two US military aircraft, marking an exceedingly rare assault on American forces not seen in over 20 years. The downing of F-15 and other aircraft demonstrates Iran's continued ability to strike back despite Trump's assertions of US military dominance.
story.signal: Major escalation in US-Iran conflict as Tehran demonstrates anti-aircraft capabilities against advanced US military hardware.

social_signals.text: Iran says the US plane downed in Isfahan was a C-130 class aircraft and that it was destroyed by a police commando unit called the Faraj Rangers
